title: Vazhve Mayam
desc: Sudhindran Nair drives out his wife Sarala thinking that she is having an illicit affair. Months later he finds out that she is innocent and goes to bring her back.

title: Meendum Savithri
desc: Manju, a middle-class woman, meets Vasudevan, who seems to be the perfect future husband. She gets married to him but later discovers that he is already married to another woman, Uma.

title: Sangamam
desc: Selvam, a rural folk artist, falls in love with Abhirami, a classical dancer. However, things become complicated when her father disapproves of their relationship.

title: Sudhandhiram
desc: Vishwa, a thug and an aspiring boxer, works for Sopraj, a gangster. When Sopraj brutally kills a social worker in front of Vishwa, he decides to turn approver against his boss.

title: Saamy
desc: Aarusaamy, a police officer, accepts bribes from Perumal, a gangster, in order to maintain peace in his district. However, circumstances force him to go against Perumal.
